violations.text: The establishment does not have a proper allergen statement for self-service food items. EMPLOYEES must be properly trained in FOOD safety, including FOOD allergyawareness, as it relates to their assigned duties. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as milk) in the dairy retail cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils. Per person in charge, staff uses food grade sanitizer wipes to clean utensils. Establishment to discontinue using wipes for all utensils and equipment. After being cleaned, ALL equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink in the Popeyes ware-washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

A list of ingredients for self service food items (sausages/hot dogs, hot sandwiches, pizza) were not available upon request. Bulk FOOD that is available for CONSUMER self-dispensing shall be prominently labeled with the following information in plain view of the CONSUMER: The manufacturer's or processor's label that was provided with the FOOD or A card, sign, or other method of notification that includes the information. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with the state at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. CFSM application left with PIC at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Per interview of staff, utensils used for self service hot foods are washed at the handsink with an unapproved daily disinfectant cleaner. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours in a 3-bay sink. Staff notified that utensils and equipment to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized, in the 3-bay sink of the adjacent establishment (Popeyes). New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Egg rolls and corndogs were observed held at 120 degrees Fahrenheit in the top shelf on the hot-holding unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff elected to voluntarily dispose of items at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

Self-service items (baked goods and hot-held foods) in the food establishment are lacking labels with a list of ingredients. Self-service items in a food establishment must be provided with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024

The top shelf of the hot-holding unit was observed to be in poor repair (top lamp not functioning). Items to not be held in the top shelf of the unit until it can be replaced/repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2024
